query:
SELECT c.code, c.title, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lessonCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId) as lessonsWithQuizzes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId) as missing
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) > COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId)
ORDER BY c.code;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.code, c.title, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lessonCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId) as lessonsWithQuizzes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId) as missing
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) > COUNT(DISTINCT q.lessonId)
ORDER BY c.code;
